name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗 Small Sunshine handbag, its streamlined design and exquisite details make this large-capacity versatile city tote stand out. Made of original color raffia material, accented with brown leather FENDI Roma lettering and brown leather tubular handle. Features ample lined interior compartments, magnetic snap, interior pocket, and gold-finish metal hardware. This handbag comes with double handles and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody
8394
Size 25cm
